title: Wiki
subtitle: Your knowledge graph. Tap a page to read it and see what links back.
exportActionBody: Build a copy-ready bundle of your pages and sources.
exportActionExample: Use it for backup, review, or continuing in another writing or research tool.
exportActionHint: Creates a copy-ready preview of your knowledge store.
empty: No pages yet. Capture something and generate its page from the inbox.
exportHelper: Copy the bundle for backup, review, or another writing or research tool. Long-press the text if clipboard copy is unavailable.
